headline: BECOME A UK QUALIFIED PERSON
subheading: The degree, experience and eligibility viva that earn the authority to certify and release batches.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking the journey to becoming a pharmaceutical Qualified Person and the weight of batch certification authority: a luminous ascending pathway of five glowing milestone nodes climbing diagonally from a scientific foundation toward a certifying seal, rendered as elegant interconnected geometry. Conceptual props float in soft focus: a translucent academic mortarboard motif dissolving into a microscope silhouette, a refined batch-release certificate plane bearing an embossed approval stamp glyph (no letters), a stylised quality-checkmark medallion, and crisp molecular and DNA-helix lattices threading through clean stainless-steel cleanroom forms and frosted glass vials catching light. Layered depth with deep navy shadows, radiant teal and cyan gradients, and a subtle fresh-green accent glinting along the path and seal, premium clinical-luxury aesthetic, glossy precise surfaces, soft volumetric side lighting, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, calm authoritative and meticulous atmosphere. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
